Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "SKOOLDAZE-077E-0800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $077e dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Skool Daze.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0779 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
